title: Chengdu Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Chengdu with a Z-Score of +4.11. The city is experiencing extreme temperatures, scoring 10.0/10 in severity.
body:
The heat wave has led to a significant increase in Cooling Degree Days (CDD) with a value of 13.4 GG, indicating a high energy demand for cooling. 
 The relative humidity is at 30%, which can exacerbate the perceived temperature. 
 The wind speed is relatively low at 6.0 km/h, contributing to the heat wave's persistence.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave response protocols immediately.
